# init(size:in:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ JavaScriptCore ](/documentation/javascriptcore)

- [ JSValue ](/documentation/javascriptcore/jsvalue)

-  init(size:in:) 

Initializer# init(size:in:)

iOS 16.0+iPadOS 16.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
init!(
    size: CGSize,
    in context: JSContext!
)
```

## [Return Value](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValue/init(size:in:)#return-value)

A newly allocated JavaScript object containing properties named width and height, with values from the CGSize.

## [Discussion](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValue/init(size:in:)#discussion)

Create a JSValue from a CGSize.
